name: codex-loop-plugin
description: Loop-driven Codex plugin and skill scaffold for multi-agent project execution.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate Codex agents through file-backed loop workflows.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin scaffold for turning project goals into planner, developer, evaluator, repair, and continuation loops with durable state.
defaultPrompt: Run Codex Loop for this project goal.
